entries.markdown:

entries.title: Release update - May 3, 2026
entries.summary: This release includes 14 features, 1 improvement, and 8 fixes.
entries.markdown:
## Features
- **webhooks**: Add WebhookEndpoint, WebhookSubscription, WebhookDelivery entities
- **webhooks**: Add migration for webhook tables
- **webhooks**: Add receipt.approved event emission and event interfaces
- **webhooks**: Add webhook DTOs
- **webhooks**: Add core webhook services (endpoints, subscriptions, delivery, dispatcher)
- **webhooks**: Add WebhookEventsListener bridging EventEmitter2 to outbound queue
- **webhooks**: Add WebhookProcessorService with retry/backoff queue
- **webhooks**: Add WebhookTokenGuard and WebhookInboundService
- **webhooks**: Add all webhook controllers
- **webhooks**: Wire WebhooksModule into app
- **frontend**: Add Webhooks plugin to Plugins tab
- **shortcuts**: Add tinykeys and keyboard shortcuts infrastructure
- **shortcuts**: Add help modal and global shortcuts provider
- **shortcuts**: Wire page-level shortcuts on statements page

## Improvements
- **webhooks**: Expand imports and @Column decorators to match codebase convention

## Fixes
- Polish workspace card UI
- **webhooks**: Use emitAsync with error logging and add bulkApprove event emission
- **webhooks**: Use @nestjs/swagger PartialType and add Swagger decorators to payload DTOs
- **webhooks**: Use entity property names in QueryBuilder (workspaceId, isActive)
- **webhooks**: Add error handling to WebhookEventsListener handlers
- **webhooks**: Fix processor runtime issues and stale lock recovery
- **webhooks**: Fix inbound service issues (unused repo, mime type, size limit, cleanup)
- **webhooks**: Fix token leak in update, add scope check in retry, remove any cast

entries.title: Release update - April 26, 2026
entries.summary: This release includes 5 features, 14 fixes, and 1 other update.
entries.markdown:
## Features
- **mobile**: Add MobileBottomBar component with 5-tab navigation
- **mobile**: Implement MobileMenuDrawer with full navigation
- **mobile**: Integrate bottom bar, hide old sidebar/hamburger on mobile
- **mobile**: Add upward radial menu to bottom bar FAB
- **mobile**: Replace breadcrumbs with logo in TopBar on mobile

## Fixes
- **ci**: Make electron build independent of CI on push events
- **mobile**: Hide bottom bar on auth/onboarding pages
- **mobile**: Hide floating FABs on mobile, replaced by bottom bar
- **mobile**: Hide user menu button, push icons right in TopBar
- **mobile**: Show only hamburger icon in user menu, hide text label
- **mobile**: Hide Menu text label, show only hamburger icon
- **mobile**: Strip container from hamburger, plain icon button
- **mobile**: Force override hamburger button size with !important
- **mobile**: Convert Sections button to icon-only circle
- **mobile**: Replace hamburger with Sections icon in TopBar
- **mobile**: Remove floating side panel open button
- **mobile**: Cap DrawerShell width to viewport on small screens
- **mobile**: Responsive reports page layout and history table
- **mobile**: Correct FAB action hrefs to open expense drawer

## Other
- Revert "fix(mobile): replace hamburger with Sections icon in TopBar"

entries.title: Release update - April 25, 2026
entries.summary: This release includes 2 features, 5 improvements, and 1 fix.
entries.markdown:
## Features
- **scss**: Add dark mode coverage to SCSS components
- **frontend**: Migrate dark mode inline styles to theme tokens

## Improvements
- **frontend**: Migrate CSS variables to JS theme tokens in dashboard and onboarding

- **backend**: Replace googleapis with individual API packages
- **backend**: Replace uuid package with native crypto.randomUUID
- **backend**: Replace isomorphic-fetch with native fetch

## Fixes

entries.title: Release update - April 25, 2026
entries.summary: This release includes 18 features, 2 improvements, and 8 fixes.
entries.markdown:
## Features
- **scss**: Add light-mode SCSS variables
- **scss**: Add dark-mode SCSS variables
- **scss**: Add SCSS mixins and abstracts barrel
- **scss**: Add JS theme tokens for inline styles migration
- **scss**: Add base reset and scrollbar styles
- **scss**: Add global theme styles
- **scss**: Add Tailwind dark mode override utilities
- **i18n**: Expand locale foundation to support 10 languages
- **scss**: Convert tour-theme to SCSS
- **scss**: Convert breadcrumbs, language-switcher, notification-dropdown, audit-panel to SCSS
- **i18n**: Expand UI language selectors to use SUPPORTED_LOCALES
- **scss**: Convert pdf-preview-modal, navigation, dashboard to SCSS
- **scss**: Convert lumio-sidebar shell to SCSS layout
- **scss**: Convert lumio-transaction-table to SCSS
- Add Slovak (sk) translations to all content files
- **scss**: Convert lumio-statements to SCSS
- **scss**: Add barrel files, globals.scss entry point, update imports
- **frontend**: Migrate static CSS token inline styles to JS tokens

## Improvements
- Remove duplicate locale type definitions and import from canonical source
- **frontend**: Migrate CSS variables to JS theme tokens

## Fixes
- **frontend**: Explicit null check in isSupportedLocale guard
- Remove unused AppLocale ghost imports from navigation-config and useOnboardingWizard
- Use DEFAULT_LOCALE fallback and extract availableLocales mapping in language selectors
- **scss**: Replace all remaining var(--) references with SCSS variables
- Add sk self-reference in navigation.content.ts languages.sk entry
- Add missing Slovak translations to content files
- Add missing Slovak translations in dropbox, google-drive, and make-cloud-storage content files
- Correct sk translations formatting in storage and integration content files

- **misc**: Update settings, admin, tours, and miscellaneous pages
- Update CSS design tokens and theme configuration

entries.title: Release update - April 13, 2026
entries.summary: This release includes 5 features, 61 improvements, and 18 fixes.
entries.markdown:
## Features
- **frontend**: Add @mui/x-date-pickers
- **frontend**: Add BEM design tokens in tokens.css
- **frontend**: Set borderRadius:0 overrides in MUI theme
- **frontend**: Import tokens.css and base.css into globals
- **frontend**: Wrap app in MUI LocalizationProvider

## Improvements
- **frontend**: Migrate Button primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate Input primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate Select primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate Checkbox primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate Card primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate ModalShell primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate DrawerShell primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate DropdownMenu primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate AppPagination primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate Badge primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate Alert primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate Separator primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate Spinner primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate Label primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate FilterChipButton primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate DetailActionButton primitive to MUI
- **frontend**: Remove residual Tailwind classes from ui/ primitives
- **frontend**: Migrate PDFThumbnail to MUI — replace Tailwind with inline styles
- **frontend**: Migrate TransactionsView pagination footer to MUI sx
- **frontend**: Migrate ExportDropdown to MUI Button — replace Tailwind
- **frontend**: Migrate NotificationDropdown to BEM block lumio-notification-dropdown
- **frontend**: Migrate PDFPreviewModal to BEM block lumio-pdf-preview-modal
- **frontend**: Migrate Navigation render section to BEM — extend lumio-navigation.css
- **frontend**: Remove residual Tailwind classes from Stage 2 components
- **frontend**: Migrate admin pages to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate auth pages to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate statements filters to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate statements list components to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate statements drawers to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate statements side panel and upload menu to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate statements edit page and parsing warnings to MUI
- **frontend**: Replace @heroui, @mui/icons-material, @iconify with MUI/lucide (workspaces/settings/storage/shared)
- **frontend**: Remove HeroUI/Mantine providers and finish icon/modal migration (custom-tables + root)
- **frontend**: Replace tailwind-merge with clsx in cn() utility
- **frontend**: Delete hero.ts and mantine-theme.ts
- **frontend**: Purge Tailwind directives from globals.css
- **frontend**: Remove legacy UI dependencies from package.json
- **frontend**: Remove Tailwind from dashboard components
- **frontend**: Remove Tailwind from transaction components
- **frontend**: Remove Tailwind from statements components (Этап 4)
- **frontend**: Final cleanup — remove react-select, fix TS errors (Этап 10)
- **frontend**: Add lumio-statements BEM block styles
- **frontend**: Migrate settings to MUI — remove Tailwind
- **frontend**: Migrate integrations + onboarding to MUI — remove Tailwind
- **frontend**: Migrate transaction duplicates pages to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate side-panel components to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate dashboard page and components to MUI
- **frontend**: Migrate reports + audit + workspaces to MUI — remove Tailwind
- **frontend**: Fix remaining Tailwind class remnants in components
- **frontend**: Complete UnapprovedCashView migration to MUI inline styles
- **frontend**: Migrate storage + receipts + custom-tables to MUI — remove Tailwind
- **frontend**: Unify primary color to LinkedIn blue #0a66c2
- **frontend**: Replace hardcoded white in integrations pages with theme tokens
- **frontend**: Replace hardcoded white in dashboard components with theme tokens
- **frontend**: Remove all non-circular border-radius from CSS block files
- **frontend**: Replace hardcoded white in storage pages with theme tokens
- **frontend**: Replace hardcoded white in shared components, audit, admin, transactions
- **frontend**: Replace hardcoded white in CSS block files with design tokens
- **frontend**: Replace hardcoded white in statements, workspaces, custom-tables
- **frontend**: Remove all non-circular border-radius from inline styles
- **frontend**: Use theme tokens in navigation CSS

## Fixes
- **frontend**: Add missing dark mode surface tokens in tokens.css
- **frontend**: Quality fixes in ui/ primitives — z-index, prop forwarding, state sync
- **frontend**: Quality fixes in Stage 2 components — deps, placeholder, CSS, dark mode
- **frontend**: Remove dead import and Tailwind classes in auth animation components
- **frontend**: Align useEditableCell ref type with React 19
- **frontend**: Fix DrawerShell sx prop typing, surface-glow color, hardcoded white
- **frontend**: Fix token misuse and missed white backgrounds in dashboard/integrations
- **frontend**: Restore unread dot circle shape, fix breadcrumbs var-based radius
- **frontend**: Fix missed whites and wrong action.hover token in shared components
- **frontend**: Fix #fff fallbacks in lumio-statements.css CSS vars
- **frontend**: Fix conditional #fff backgrounds in StoragePageContent
- **frontend**: Fix remaining hardcoded whites in statements components
- **frontend**: Add semantic warning/error surface tokens, fix hover state token in receipts
- **frontend**: Fix remaining conditional and isDark white backgrounds in custom-tables, workspaces, statements
- **frontend**: Remove redundant borderRadius: 0 from mobile checkbox
- **frontend**: Fix ModalShell className prop, PDF modal whites, build error
- **frontend**: Add contentClassName prop to ModalShellProps
- Get ridd of any type in the whole production code base an

entries.title: Release update - April 11, 2026
entries.summary: This release includes 39 improvements and 1 fix.
entries.markdown:
## Improvements
- **frontend**: Extract shared analytics helpers into analytics-common.ts
- **frontend**: Extract StatementsListView inline helpers to utils
- **frontend**: Extract useStatementPreview and useStatementSelection hooks
- **frontend**: Extract useStatementsListData hook for data fetching and polling
- **frontend**: Move formatPaginationLabel helper to utils (P1i)
- **frontend**: Extract useAnalyticsData hook, apply to all 4 analytics views
- **frontend**: Extract useSpendOverTimeState hook from SpendOverTimeView
- **frontend**: Extract paste clipboard helpers to pasteUtils.ts (P2a)
- **frontend**: Extract useRowDrawer and useDeleteModals from CustomTableDetailPage (P2f+P2g)
- **frontend**: Extract useTableMeta from CustomTableDetailPage (P2e)
- **frontend**: Extract useColumnConfig from CustomTableDetailPage (P2d)
- **frontend**: Extract useTabStats hook from CustomTable detail page
- **frontend**: Extract useTableGrid hook from CustomTable detail page
- **frontend**: Extract tableHelpers.ts from CustomTable detail page
- **frontend**: Extract useTableData hook and tableTypes from CustomTable page
- **frontend**: Extract usePasteImport hook from CustomTable detail page
- **frontend**: Extract useRowActions, useBulkRowActions, useColumnManagement hooks
- **frontend**: Extract useTableFilters hook and PastePreviewModal component
- **frontend**: Extract AddColumnModal sub-component from CustomTable page
- **frontend**: Extract ColumnsVisibilityPanel and remove dead code
- **frontend**: Remove unused destructured values from CustomTable page
- **frontend**: Extract customTablesHelpers.ts and use shared intlayer utils
- **frontend**: Extract useCustomTablesData hook from CustomTables list page
- **frontend**: Extract StoragePageContent helpers and sub-components
- **frontend**: Extract useStorageFiles, useStorageFolders, useStorageTags from StoragePageContent
- **frontend**: Extract useStorageDnd, useStorageFilters, useStorageViews, useStorageTrash from StoragePageContent
- **frontend**: Extract editHelpers and useStatementEditForm hook (PR 2u+2v)
- **frontend**: Extract analytics-filter-labels helper (PR 1b)
- **frontend**: Extract profileHelpers.ts for Settings Profile (PR 3a partial)
- **frontend**: Extract useSessions, useNotifications, useProfileForm hooks (PR 3a)
- **frontend**: Extract useAppearance, useAvatarUpload, useChangelog, useEmailForm, usePasswordForm hooks (PR 3a cont.)
- **frontend**: Extract useExpenseForm hook from CreateExpenseDrawer (PR 3c)
- **frontend**: Replace inline helpers with shared imports in Navigation.tsx (PR 3b)
- **frontend**: Replace inline helpers with shared imports in UnapprovedCashView (PR 3d)
- **frontend**: Replace inline helpers with shared imports across 7 files
- **frontend**: Extract ECharts option builders to chart helper files (PR 1d)
- **frontend**: Extract profile settings section components
- **frontend**: Extract useTransactionData hook and transactionMapper helper
- **frontend**: Split DetailsDrawer into tabs and history hook

## Fixes
- **frontend**: Align refactored hooks with tightened types from main

entries.title: Release update - April 6, 2026
entries.summary: This release includes 13 improvements and 9 fixes.
entries.markdown:
## Improvements
- **repo**: Extract shared parsing and validation utilities
- **backend**: Deduplicate parsing and integration helpers
- **frontend**: Extract formatDateTime to shared utility
- **frontend**: Extract side panel utilities to shared module
- **frontend**: Extract safeInternalPath to shared utility
- **frontend**: Extract useEditableCell hook to reduce cell duplication
- **frontend**: Apply side-panel-utils imports to profile and StatementsListView
- **frontend**: Extract LogoAvatar base component from bank and brand avatars
- **frontend**: Merge FilterAvatarRow into FilterOptionRow
- **frontend**: Unify storage widgets into BaseStorageWidget
- **frontend**: Consolidate confirmation modals into unified ConfirmModal
- **frontend**: Extract useIntegrationStatus hook and shared integration components
- **frontend**: Extract shared types and filters hook from analysis views

## Fixes
- Get ridd of any type in the whole production codebase
- **frontend**: Use system locale fallback in formatDateTime utility
- **frontend**: Memoize editableCell handlers and guard against NaN in number cells
- **frontend**: Throw on missing Drive picker token instead of silently failing
- **frontend**: Reset imageError on src change and add role=img to LogoAvatar fallback
- **frontend**: Tighten hasAvatar detection and apply variant in avatar branch
- **frontend**: Fix double toast, stabilize messages ref, and fix syncFailed message
- **frontend**: Migrate TopSpendersView to shared types and remove dead utils
- Get ridd of any type in the whole production code base and refactor key components N#1

## Fixes

entries.title: Release update - April 1, 2026
entries.summary: This release includes 8 fixes and 26 other updates.
entries.markdown:
## Fixes
- **docker**: Add dev stage to backend Dockerfile for devDependencies
- **docker**: Remove Task 3 dependencies from Dockerfile
- **docker**: Update docker-compose.dev.yml to target dev stage
- **seed**: Pre-compile seed scripts to avoid ts-node OOM
- **seed**: Use compiled scripts for all tools, fix local fallback
- **frontend**: Add serverExternalPackages for intlayer node:fs compat
- **seed**: Compile scripts locally before running in dev
- Login & register pages
